criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings across app stores and review platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Trustpilot

criteria.name: Features
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of AI-powered financial management features.

criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: Number of active users or downloads.
criteria.sources: Official app statistics, app store data

criteria.name: Security Measures
criteria.description: Implementation of security protocols to protect user data.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Pricing structure, including free tiers and subscription fees.
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings
